headline: Local agentic tooling surges as GGUF deployment, AI memory systems, and real-time voice pipelines all break out together.
body: The window centers on local and agentic infrastructure: DeepReinforce released Ornith, a family of open agentic coding models from 9B to 397B built on Gemma and Qwen, with 35B and 9B variants packaged in GGUF for local inference. An AI Research OS turns 10,000+ Obsidian notes into live agent context through a three-layer memory architecture without vector or graph databases, while the TEN Framework pushes real-time voice agents with streaming audio, interruption handling, and collision detection. New entrants in failure analysis, traffic estimation, and full-stack development emerge from a system design framework, and Dwarkesh Patel's training-paradigm discussion foregrounds reinforcement learning and verification.
